note: Third-party certification (Schellman or equivalent) pending. This is a self-declared compliance statement, not an AIUC-1 certificate.

measures: HMAC-SHA256 request signing
HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite=Strict session cookies
IP rate limiting (1 registration per IP per 24h)
Content injection prevention (alphanumeric allowlist)
Admin auth gate with HMAC-signed session tokens
Content policy PAID_LLC_POLICY_V1 (publicly documented in /ai.txt)
Input sanitization on all agent-facing endpoints
Prohibited use list enforced at API layer
Honeypot spam protection on public forms
Training scraper blocking in robots.txt
Cloudflare Pages edge runtime (global distribution)
Stateless API design (no server-side session state)
Graceful error handling with structured error responses
SSE timeout handling (55s Cloudflare edge limit respected)
No PII stored beyond contact email for intake requests
Supabase Row-Level Security (RLS) enabled on all tables
HttpOnly session tokens (inaccessible to JavaScript)
No third-party tracking on agent-facing API endpoints
Agent commerce audit log (ucp_action_log table)
Intake request tracking with status lifecycle
Admin review workflow before agent deployment
Rate limiting per IP per 24h for all write endpoints
Prohibited uses documented in /ai.txt (PAID_LLC_POLICY_V1)
Redistribution policy enforced
Content policy publicly accessible at /ai.txt
Training data scraper blocking in robots.txt

certification_path: Full AIUC-1 third-party certification via accredited auditor (e.g. Schellman) planned. See https://www.aiuc-1.com/ for certification details.
